# Cybereason Individual Contributor License Agreement (ICLA)

Thank you for contributing to owLSM.

This Individual Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") is between you (the "Contributor") and Cybereason Ltd. ("Cybereason").

By signing this Agreement, you allow Cybereason and recipients of the project to use your contributions under the terms below.

## 1. Definitions

- **Contribution** means any source code, documentation, files, comments, patches, pull requests, or other material intentionally submitted by you to the owLSM project.
- **Project** means the owLSM repository and its related repositories or distributions managed by Cybereason.

## 2. Copyright License Grant

You retain ownership of your copyrights in your Contributions.

You grant Cybereason a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, irrevocable, transferable, sublicensable, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, distribute, and otherwise exploit your Contributions for any purpose, including commercial purposes.

## 3. Patent License Grant

To the extent you have the right to grant them, you grant Cybereason and downstream recipients a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, irrevocable, royalty-free patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer your Contributions.

If you or an entity you control initiates patent litigation alleging that the Project or a Contribution infringes a patent, any patent licenses granted by you for the Project under this Agreement terminate as of the date such litigation is filed.

## 4. Project Open Source License

You agree that your Contributions may be distributed as part of the Project under the Project's open source license (currently GPL-2.0), and may also be used by Cybereason under the broader rights granted in this Agreement.

## 5. Contributor Representations

You represent that:

- You are legally entitled to grant the rights in this Agreement.
- Each Contribution is your original work, or you have sufficient rights to submit it.
- If your employer or another party has rights in your Contributions, you have obtained all permissions required to submit those Contributions under this Agreement.

## 6. No Compensation; No Obligation

You understand and agree that:

- You are not entitled to compensation, royalties, accounting, or other payment from Cybereason for any use of your Contributions.
- Cybereason has no obligation to use, publish, maintain, support, or distribute any Contribution.

## 7. Disclaimer

Except as expressly stated in this Agreement, Contributions are provided "as is", without warranties or conditions of any kind, express or implied.

## 8. Acceptance

By commenting the exact phrase below on a pull request as requested by the CLA bot, you agree to this Agreement:

`I have read the CLA and I hereby sign it`

## 9. Contributions on Behalf of an Employer

If you submit Contributions that are owned or controlled by your employer (or another legal entity), a Corporate CLA may also be required. See [`CCLA.md`](./CCLA.md).
